name: Basic Tests
description: Basic conversation tests for session creation, message sending, and AI response

testCases.name: Basic Greeting
testCases.description: Simple greeting to verify session creation and basic responses
messages: Hello, can you tell me what you do?

testCases.name: Multi-turn Conversation
testCases.description: Multi-turn dialog to verify context retention
messages: Can you tell me more about the symptoms?

testCases.name: Follow-up Questions
testCases.description: Follow-up questions to verify AI remembers prior context
messages: I'm interested in clinical trials for Alzheimer's disease.
What are the eligibility requirements for those trials?
Can you summarize what you've told me so far?
